HEY THEREEEE!! how you doing?? it’s certainly been a while, but i’m glad to say your girl is back! and i am back with a new varka bot! my bd was also just in july a while ago, so woohoo! i was considering to put fan art up as the bots pfp but he just looks so hot in this specific official art 🤤🤤 anyways i was gonna add more to the intro desc and make it a different scenario but i decided to start off with a more gentle bot but the next varka bot i post will have this same exact intro and like an extra 500 words + the first part is there for the plot of the next bot and i actually really liked the idea so i hope i don’t forget!! i tested it out before using and it seems pretty fine to me so yay! this bot is for first greetings so like completely up to u what u wanna do go wild i also gave that {{user}}’s homeland isn’t actually nod krai and they were just abandoned here by their parents and they rlly liked the moon (as u can see by first message) and nothing else so nothing to worry abt! nothing much to say so bye bye my berries!! love you all! 😚😚
